narrative:
Strongsville-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,129 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.3 percentage points.
